## Collections.AggregatedResultMap.update() method

Updates an existing item by its composite ID. Fails if the item doesn't exist.

**Signature:**

```typescript
update(key: TCOMPOSITEID, value: TITEM): DetailedResult<TITEM, ResultMapResultDetail>;
```

</td></tr>
</tbody></table>

**Returns:**

[DetailedResult](./ts-utils.detailedresult.md)<!-- -->&lt;TITEM, [ResultMapResultDetail](./ts-utils.collections.resultmapresultdetail.md)<!-- -->&gt;

`Success` with the value if updated, `Failure` otherwise.
